automated.name: compile
automated.details: All 5 modules compile: sacco-common, sacco-member, sacco-contribution, sacco-loan, sacco-payout

automated.name: tests
automated.details: 136 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors across all modules

automated.name: types
automated.details: Java — compile check covers type safety

security.notes: No secrets exposed; events use authenticated actor via SecurityContextHolder; no raw SQL; input validated at API boundaries

contractCompatibility.notes: All events are additive (new MemberStatusChangeEvent, PenaltyWaivedEvent); no breaking API changes; outbox schema changes are backward-compatible column resizing and index additions

failureBehavior.notes: Dead letter queue with exponential backoff (5min base, 3x multiplier, 4h cap, max 5 retries); SKIP LOCKED prevents concurrent processor contention; idempotency keys include UUID suffix to prevent sub-millisecond collisions

testQuality.notes: All service implementations have outbox verification; ArgumentCaptor used to assert event field correctness; edge cases covered (already-waived penalty, not-found entities, different actors); waivePenalty outbox verification added during review

scopeHygiene.notes: Changes limited to event infrastructure hardening — no unrelated refactors; 7 plans executed with clear scope boundaries

principles.name: Think Before Coding
principles.notes: 7 plans created with clear scope; context contracts and research artifacts preceded implementation

principles.name: Simplicity First
principles.notes: Reused existing outbox infrastructure; events are simple immutable records; no over-engineered abstractions

principles.name: Surgical Changes
principles.notes: Each plan touched only necessary files; no drive-by refactors; scope limited to event hardening

principles.name: Goal-Driven Execution
principles.notes: 136 tests pass; all 11 service impls use EventOutboxWriter; compile verified across 5 modules

principles.name: Prefer shared utility packages over hand-rolled helpers
principles.notes: TransitionGuard shared across 4 modules; EventOutboxWriter is the single shared event writing mechanism

principles.name: Don't probe data YOLO-style
principles.notes: Events follow explicit schema (AuditableEvent interface); typed records with named fields

principles.name: Validate boundaries
principles.notes: TransitionGuard validates state transitions at domain boundary; pessimistic locking with SKIP LOCKED prevents concurrent processing

principles.name: Typed SDKs
principles.notes: All events are typed Java records implementing AuditableEvent; no raw maps or untyped payloads
